title: Mexican Date Delight
description: A sweet and tangy dessert made with ripe dates and a hint of Mexican spice. Perfect for a warm evening or a special occasion.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the chopped Mexican chocolate and coconut flakes.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the pitted dates and lime juice.
3. Add the date mixture to the chocolate mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Spoon the mixture into individual serving bowls.
5. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
